---
title: "Ejercicio 4.2_R_1"
---

```{r}
# Fijamos semilla para que los resultados sean reproducibles
set.seed(123)
# Cantidad de réplicas
B <- 100

# Tamaños muestrales
n <- c(10, 20, 30)
```

```{r}
# Simulación de las medias muestrales
medias_n10 <- replicate(B, mean(runif(10, min = 240, max = 260)))
medias_n20 <- replicate(B, mean(runif(20, min = 240, max = 260)))
medias_n30 <- replicate(B, mean(runif(30, min = 240, max = 260)))

```


```{r}
# Histogramas
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

hist(medias_n10,
     main = "n = 10",
     xlab = "Media muestral",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "white",
     xlim = c(240, 260))

hist(medias_n20,
     main = "n = 20",
     xlab = "Media muestral",
     col = "lightgreen",
     border = "white",
     xlim = c(240, 260))

hist(medias_n30,
     main = "n = 30",
     xlab = "Media muestral",
     col = "lightpink",
     border = "white",
     xlim = c(240, 260))

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

```
